title: Travel disruption report
subtitle: Explain what happened and ask for help or compensation.
duolingoBridge: B1 Output turns B1 knowledge into usable production: speaking, writing, summarizing native-style input, reacting, arguing, and self-correcting.
overview: Knowledge point 1: report timeline and consequence.
Knowledge point 2: request a practical solution.

sections.title: Output tools
rows: I would like to know if...

items.fr: Mon train a été annulé moins d’une heure avant le départ.
items.en: My train was canceled less than one hour before departure.
items.es: Mi tren fue cancelado menos de una hora antes de la salida.

items.fr: À cause de cela, j’ai manqué ma correspondance.
items.en: Because of that, I missed my connection.
items.es: A causa de eso, perdí mi conexión.

items.fr: Cela m’a obligé à acheter un nouveau billet.
items.en: This forced me to buy a new ticket.
items.es: Esto me obligó a comprar un nuevo billete.

items.fr: Je souhaiterais savoir si une compensation est possible.
items.en: I would like to know if compensation is possible.
items.es: Quisiera saber si es posible una compensación.

items.fr: Je peux fournir les justificatifs si nécessaire.
items.en: I can provide the supporting documents if necessary.
items.es: Puedo proporcionar los justificantes si es necesario.
